creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 161203
www/codeigniter: security update 2.1.4 -> 2.2.4

Allan, do you actually use this?  Can you see if this update meets the muster at runtime?

Seeing this, https://github.com/bcit-ci/CodeIgniter/commit/69b02d0f0bc46e914bed1604cfbd9bf74286b2e3, make me think the PHP 5.4 specific issue may have been fixed since the 2.1.4 release.

Looking at this port the incremental updates on Codeigniter have been a wide range of security issues and this port hasn't had a version bump in 2 years.  I'm looking into the range of them for VuXML.
